notableEvents.label: Teoscar Hernández GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Teoscar Hernández grounds into a double play, second baseman Ketel Marte to first baseman Carlos Santana. Max Muncy out at 2nd. Teoscar Hernández out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Mookie Betts plunked
notableEvents.detail: Mookie Betts hit by pitch. Andy Pages to 3rd. Kyle Tucker to 2nd.
